query:
-- Legrand AV Australia billing items
SELECT bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Legrand%'
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC;

-- Osprey services detail
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue
FROM services WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0038';

-- GBA S0470 (ABB 1000Mbps $703) - check if there's a Xero item for this
-- GBA Data - Internet is $3693 on S0988 (SasBoss) - so the ABB line is the actual cost
-- The Xero "Data - Internet" $3693 is already on S0988 (SasBoss) and S0336 (ABB)
-- S0470 (ABB 1000Mbps $703) and S0337 (ABB NBN 100/40 $81) have no revenue
-- S8F26A7 (ChannelHaus GBA $451) has no revenue
-- SSX5LKL (Tech-e 250Mbps Toowoomba $250) has no revenue
-- Check if there are Xero items for these specific services
SELECT bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.contactName
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.serviceExternalId IN ('S0470', 'S0337', 'S8F26A7', 'SSX5LKL');
